mapper.sql: c.id, c.user_id, c.product_id, c.quantity, c.selected, c.create_time, c.update_time, p.name AS product_name, p.subtitle AS product_subtitle, p.main_image AS product_image, p.price, p.market_price, p.stock, p.status, CASE WHEN p.price IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE p.price * c.quantity END AS item_amount, CASE WHEN p.id IS NOT NULL AND p.status = 1 AND p.stock >= c.quantity THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS can_checkout
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM cart_item c LEFT JOIN product p ON p.id = c.product_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.update_time DESC, c.id DESC

SELECT
FROM cart_item c LEFT JOIN product p ON p.id = c.product_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.selected = 1 ORDER BY c.update_time DESC, c.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_item ( user_id, product_id, quantity, selected ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{selected} )
